name: Social - Under Contract Post
_security_notes: Approval links are GET (confirm page, no side effect). POST with token publishes.
Content read from Postgres by token — never from query string.
Tokens are UUID v4 (unguessable), single-use (consumed=true after publish).
agentEmail must be validated against internal domain before use.
All address/agent fields are HTML-escaped in email body.
FUB webhook should be verified via FUB-Signature HMAC-SHA256 header (see references/fub-api.md).
Add n8n credential: FUB webhook secret → compare against X-FUB-Signature header in a Function node at step 1.

messages.content: You write real estate social media posts for The Anchor Group in Palm Coast, Florida. Brand philosophy: Dolphins Not Sharks. Fair Housing compliant: never reference schools, crime, or neighborhood demographics. Posts are 50-100 words. End with: — The Anchor Group

=Write 3 Under Contract posts.
Property: {{$json.address}}, {{$json.city}}, FL
Price: ${{$json.price}} | {{$json.beds}} bed / {{$json.baths}} bath
Agent: {{$json.agent}}

Write exactly 3 variations labeled COASTAL:, FAMILY:, and LUXURY: on separate lines. Each 50-100 words. Celebrate the milestone warmly.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO nightshift.social_drafts (id, workflow, address, tone, content, agent_email) VALUES ('{{$json.token}}', '{{$json.workflow}}', '{{$json.address}}', '{{$json.tone}}', '{{$json.content.replace(/'/g, "''")}}}', '{{$json.agentEmail}}')

parameters.subject: =Under Contract post ready — {{$json.address[0]}}
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{$json.agent[0]}},

The AI drafted 3 options for {{$json.address[0]}}, FL. Click a button to preview and confirm — the post won't go out until you confirm on the next screen.

{{$json.tone.map((tone,i)=>'' + tone + '').join(' ')}}

Each link shows you the full post before anything is published. — Anchor Group AI

parameters.query: =SELECT id, tone, content, consumed FROM nightshift.social_drafts WHERE id = '{{$json.query.token}}'

parameters.responseBody:
=

Under Contract Post — {{$json[0].tone}} Tone

{{$json[0].consumed ? '

This draft has already been used.

' : '
' + $json[0].content + '
'}}

parameters.query: =UPDATE nightshift.social_drafts SET consumed=true, consumed_at=now() WHERE id='{{$json.body.token}}' AND consumed=false RETURNING id, content, tone

parameters.responseBody:
✓ Under Contract post published!

It's live on the Anchor Group Facebook page.

This approval link has already been used.

The post was already published, or the link expired.
